title: Twilight Class
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|We didn't just break the Summit Class record; we absolutely destroyed it!|[[Ma'w'shiye]]|<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>}}
'''Twilight Class''' was the name of one of the classes at the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]].

The greatest class of the GOSS, Twilight Class finished their final test as Team 8 with mark time 103.7 hours - which broke the previous, seven-year-old record of [[Summit Class]] in more than one day. This earned them the respect of GOSS dean [[Barosa Warren]], who offered one of the Twilight Class members a job as instructor at the GOSS. It also gave them a nemesis in the form of [[Lunkar An]], a former Summit veteran who had seen his ego shaken.

However, soon afterwards, eleven of the twelve members of the Twilight Class joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Many of the Twilights became the infamous SpecForce [[Eclipse Team]], which was hounded by different enemies (including An).

Barosa Warren also rejected them and became a threat to any of his former students who had joined the Rebel Alliance. Twilight Class member [[Kiras Torla]], who never joined the Rebel Alliance, was so scared of Warren that she escaped to the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].
